authentication.nonFrontendCallbackException: POST /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-cases/from-ai uses x-callback-api-key and is omitted here.

properties: source: string enum = Ai | User | System | Imported
notes: If selectedEndpointIds is empty or omitted, backend falls back to TestSuite.SelectedEndpointIds.
Backend validates specificationId must equal suite.ApiSpecId.
Approve has an idempotent fast-path for already approved/applied proposals with AppliedOrder.
Backend rewrites orderIndex into consecutive 1..N whenever proposal JSON is serialized/deserialized.
status and source are string enums in this response model.
Entity fields LlmModel and TokensUsed are not exposed here.
activeProposalStatus is numeric in current JSON response.

endpoints.name: ProposeApiTestOrder
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails for empty suiteId/specificationId, suite ownership failure, suite/spec mismatch, or invalid endpoint scope.
404 when suiteId does not exist.
notes: Creating a new proposal supersedes previous Pending, Approved, and ModifiedAndApproved proposals.

endpoints.name: GetLatestApiTestOrderProposal
problemCases: 404 when suiteId does not exist or the suite has no proposal yet.
400 ProblemDetails when caller is not the suite owner.
notes: Returns the newest proposal by ProposalNumber desc, regardless of status.

endpoints.name: ReorderApiTestOrder
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when rowVersion or orderedEndpointIds is missing.
400 ProblemDetails for invalid base64 rowVersion, non-owner access, non-Pending proposal, or invalid endpoint set.
404 when suiteId or proposalId does not exist in the suite.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT when rowVersion is stale.

endpoints.name: ApproveApiTestOrder
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when rowVersion is missing.
400 ProblemDetails for invalid base64 rowVersion, non-owner access, invalid proposal state, or empty final order.
404 when suiteId or proposalId does not exist in the suite.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT when rowVersion is stale.
notes: Approve writes AppliedOrder and updates suite.ApprovalStatus in the same transaction.

endpoints.name: RejectApiTestOrder
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when rowVersion or reviewNotes is missing.
400 ProblemDetails for invalid base64 rowVersion, blank reviewNotes after trim, non-owner access, or non-Pending proposal.
404 when suiteId or proposalId does not exist in the suite.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT when rowVersion is stale.

endpoints.name: GetApiTestOrderGateStatus
problemCases: 404 when suiteId does not exist.
400 ProblemDetails when caller is not the suite owner.
notes: This endpoint returns 200 even when gate fails. FE must inspect isGatePassed and reasonCode.

endpoints.name: GenerateTestsLegacyAsync
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails when suiteId is empty, caller is not the suite owner, there is no approved proposal, or the resolved order is empty.
404 when suiteId does not exist.
notes: Legacy async n8n trigger still exists but is not the primary FE-05B frontend route.
Unlike order-gate-status, this legacy command only searches proposal status Approved or ModifiedAndApproved.

runtimeRules: All FE-05A endpoints are permission-protected and also enforce suite ownership in handlers.
Proposal creation falls back to persisted suite scope when selectedEndpointIds is empty.
Latest proposal query does not filter out Superseded or Rejected statuses.
Reorder only works when proposal status is Pending.
Approve/reject updates proposal and suite together in one transaction.
Gate pass depends on active proposal status in [Approved, ModifiedAndApproved, Applied] plus AppliedOrder != empty.
